understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all KA59 levels by positioning every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously to trigger WIN for the level, repeating until the final level is cleared.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently controlled selectable (identified by player.id and player.position) moves in 3-pixel grid steps via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN with x increasing to the right and y increasing downward. Movement can be blocked by walls or other objects; the movement.*_blocked flags only indicate adjacent occupancy and aren’t definitive. Some adjacent objects are pushable blocks that can be moved when the selected piece moves into them (pushing them along if space allows), while walls/boundaries stop movement (with potentially non-uniform blocking behavior). When multiple selectables exist, control switches using CLICK at the exact pixel coordinate of the target selectable from the objects/selectables list.
